category_sources: Official SourceForge project README describes MATIO as a MATLAB MAT file I/O library.
source_facts.description says it is a C library for reading and writing MATLAB MAT files.
display_name_sources: Official SourceForge README heading uses MATIO - MATLAB MAT file I/O library.
source_facts.name is libmatio, the packaged library name.
docs_sources: Official SourceForge repository README is a documentation surface with introduction and build instructions.
source_facts.homepage is the official matio SourceForge project site.
repo_sources: Official SourceForge project exposes the matio Git repository.
source_facts.source-archive is released from the official SourceForge matio project.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies MATLAB MAT file read/write support.
